results.evidence: classifyOrigin() in skill-scanner.ts:58-70 builds prefix set from AGENTS_REGISTRY, checks first segment of relative path
Scanner doesn't deduplicate; both copies appear with correct origin based on path
SkillGroupList.tsx:59-79 renders 'Your Skills' section for source, :82-149 renders 'Installed' section for installed
SkillGroupList.tsx:59 conditional: sourceGroups.length > 0 gates source section
SkillGroupList.tsx:82 conditional: installedGroups.length > 0 gates installed section
SkillGroupList.tsx:22-33 filters before splitting by origin, preserving grouping
SkillCard.tsx:44-49 renders lock SVG when isInstalled
SkillCard.tsx conditional only renders icon/opacity for installed; source uses defaults
EditorPanel.tsx:397 readOnly={isReadOnly} on textarea, :408 opacity dimmed. Fixed: context guards on saveContent
RunPanel.tsx:100-108 bulk buttons disabled. Fixed: per-case RunCaseCard buttons now also disabled={isReadOnly}. Context guard on runCase/runAll
TestsPanel.tsx:138-139 Create/Generate disabled. Fixed: CaseDetail run/compare/delete/edit controls now gated by isReadOnly. AssertionRow edit/delete hidden
Source skills have isReadOnly=false, all controls remain functional
SkillGroupList.tsx:125-145 info banner inside installed section explains distinction
Fixed: SkillGroupList.tsx now has bannerDismissed state + sessionStorage('vskill-origin-banner-dismissed'), X button to dismiss
Banner text: 'Skills inside agent folders (.claude/, .cursor/, etc.) are installed copies for consuming. Edit skills in your project root instead.'

findings.title: Per-case run buttons were not disabled for installed skills (FIXED)
findings.issue: RunCaseCard per-case Compare/Skill/Base buttons and CaseDetail Run/Compare/Delete/Fix buttons had no isReadOnly check
findings.suggestion: Added isReadOnly prop to RunCaseCard, disabled per-case buttons. Added isReadOnly guards to CaseDetail buttons
findings.impact: Users could trigger per-case benchmarks on installed skills

findings.title: No context-level guards on mutating functions (FIXED)
findings.issue: saveContent, saveEvals, runCase, runAll, submitAiEdit, generateEvals had no isReadOnly early-return guard
findings.suggestion: Added if (isReadOnly) return guards to all mutating context functions
findings.impact: Even with UI disabled, programmatic access or missed UI gates could trigger mutations

findings.title: TestsPanel CaseDetail editing controls not gated (FIXED)
findings.issue: Prompt/expected click-to-edit, assertion add/edit/delete all accessible for installed skills
findings.suggestion: Added isReadOnly checks to onClick handlers, cursor styles, conditionally hidden delete buttons
findings.impact: Users could edit eval data for installed skills

findings.title: Info banner had no dismiss mechanism (FIXED)
findings.issue: AC-US5-02 requires dismissable banner with session persistence. Implementation had no X button or sessionStorage
findings.suggestion: Added bannerDismissed state initialized from sessionStorage, X button that sets sessionStorage('vskill-origin-banner-dismissed')
findings.impact: Banner re-appeared on every section expand, no way to permanently dismiss in session
